changelog: Bug 2 fix: Added _isShuttingDown flag so OnClosing no longer cancels close and hides to tray when Exit is clicked — the process actually exits, and re-launch starts fresh with a visible window. Bug 1 fix: TerminateProcess now uses Kill(entireProcessTree) and taskkill /F /T as fallback; dead EnforceLockedProcesses is now called from the enforcement loop.
